NAVAREA XIX 74/16
NORWEGIAN SEA
SEISMIC SURVEY BY M/V RAMFORM TETHYS FROM 15 JUL TO 31 OCT. 
TOWING 16 SEISMIC CABLES OF 9000 METERS IN LENGTH IN AREA B0UND BY

A. 66-20.3N 006-28.8E
B. 67-16.2N 004-33.8E
C. 67-37.6N 005-36.5E
D. 67-41.3N 006-49.4E
E. 67-44.2N 008-00.7E
F. 66-48.6N 008-33.8E
G. 66-23.8N 008-01.6E

SIX MILE BERTH REQUESTED.
